one_line_summary: Excellent architecture and tutorial documents demonstrating deep codebase understanding, but the API reference is heavily templated, lacks useful examples, and suffers from poor signature matching.
strengths: Outstanding architecture diagram and data flow description
High-quality, runnable tutorial with a realistic custom tool and offline stub provider
Thorough codebase exploration leading to an accurate mental model
weaknesses: API reference uses repetitive filler templates instead of useful descriptions and examples
Very low signature match rate (19%) in the API documentation
Lack of meaningful cross-references between the three documents
